alerts.name: 2024-alert-001
alerts.description: A tool associated with credential dumping activity (Mimikatz) was detected on the virtual machine PROD-VM-01. Attackers use these tools to harvest credentials from memory.
recommended_actions: ⚠️  IMMEDIATE: Escalate to Tier 2 — critical-path indicator detected
Check for lateral movement using stolen credentials
Review privileged account activity in Azure AD sign-in logs
Document findings in ServiceNow/ticketing system with this report attached
remediation_steps: Isolate the virtual machine from the network immediately
Collect volatile evidence before powering off
Rotate all credentials that may have been exposed
Review recent authentication events for lateral movement

alerts.name: 2024-alert-002
alerts.display_name: Suspicious RDP Activity from External IP
alerts.description: Suspicious Remote Desktop Protocol (RDP) activity was detected from an external IP address 185.220.101.45 to virtual machine PROD-VM-02. This IP is associated with known threat actor infrastructure.
recommended_actions: ⚠️  IMMEDIATE: Escalate to Tier 2 — critical-path indicator detected
Review east-west traffic in NSG flow logs
Check for additional compromised hosts via similar alerts
Block source IP 185.220.101.45 in Azure NSG and perimeter firewall
Document findings in ServiceNow/ticketing system with this report attached
remediation_steps: Block the source IP 185.220.101.45 at NSG and perimeter firewall
Review RDP access logs for successful authentication
Restrict RDP access to VPN only via Network Security Group
Enable Just-in-Time VM access in Defender for Cloud

alerts.name: 2024-alert-003
alerts.description: Behavior consistent with ransomware was detected on PROD-VM-03. Multiple files were renamed with unknown extensions and shadow copies were deleted using vssadmin.
recommended_actions: ⚠️  IMMEDIATE: Escalate to Tier 2 — critical-path indicator detected
IMMEDIATELY isolate PROD-VM-03 from all networks
Check Azure Backup for pre-infection restore points
Notify CISO and Legal within 30 minutes
Document findings in ServiceNow/ticketing system with this report attached
remediation_steps: IMMEDIATELY isolate PROD-VM-03 from all network connections
Do NOT power off — preserve volatile evidence in RAM
Check Azure Backup for pre-infection restore points
Notify CISO and Legal within 30 minutes
